message:
test(core): add property-based tests for InputRing invariants (ft-2p9cb.2.2.3)

12 proptests: len bounded, accounting invariant, backpressure consistency,
seq monotonicity, FIFO ordering, drain bounds, drain_expired correctness,
utilization bounds, snapshot serde, item serde, backpressure serde,
wraparound integrity. 103 proptests total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
